full_name: Massachusetts State Building Code (780 CMR) — Base Volume
note: Adopts and amends IRC/IBC 2021 + IECC 2021 with MA modifications. Effective 2023.

full_name: International Energy Conservation Code
note: Federal baseline for energy code; chapter R4 residential prescriptive paths.

full_name: International Residential Code
note: Chapter 11 (energy efficiency) parallels IECC residential. Tables N1102.1.2/3.

full_name: Massachusetts Stretch Energy Code
note: Opt-in code more stringent than base; adopted by ~300 of 351 MA municipalities.

full_name: Massachusetts Specialized Opt-In Stretch Code
note: Most stringent MA pathway; required all-electric ready and net-zero pathway. Required for many large new construction projects.

full_name: ASHRAE Handbook of Fundamentals
note: Source for film R-values

full_name: ANSI/ASHRAE Standard 62.2 — Ventilation and Acceptable IAQ in Residential Buildings
note: Whole-building and local-exhaust ventilation rates.

full_name: ANSI/ASHRAE/IES Standard 90.1 — Energy Standard for Buildings Except Low-Rise Residential
note: Appendix A documents prescriptive assembly U-factors.

full_name: ANSI/ASHRAE Standard 90.2 — Energy-Efficient Design of Low-Rise Residential Buildings
note: Residential-specific minimums; complements 62.2 and IECC.

full_name: ANSI/BPI-1100-T-2023 — Standard Practice for Home Energy Auditing
note: Auditor-grade audit procedures; component R-value lookups in Annex.

full_name: ANSI/BPI-1200-S-2017 — Standard Practice for Basic Analysis of Buildings
note: N-factor table; CFM50/ACH50 procedures.

full_name: ANSI/BPI-2400-S-2015 — Standard Practice for Standardized Qualification of Whole-House Energy Savings Predictions
note: Statistical validation of predicted savings; SIR.

full_name: DOE Standard Work Specifications for Single Family Housing
note: Weatherization Assistance Program reference assemblies and procedures.

full_name: NFRC 100 — Procedure for Determining Fenestration Product U-factors
note: Whole-window U-factor test/simulation method.

full_name: NFRC 200 — Procedure for Determining Fenestration Product Solar Heat Gain Coefficient
note: Whole-window SHGC method.

full_name: NFRC 400 — Procedure for Determining Fenestration Product Air Leakage
note: Air leakage in CFM/ft² @ 75 Pa.

full_name: NFRC 500 — Procedure for Determining Fenestration Product Condensation Resistance Values
note: Condensation Resistance (CR).

full_name: NFRC Certified Product Directory
note: Manufacturer-certified whole-unit performance values.

full_name: ASTM C518 — Steady-State Heat Flux Measurements via Heat Flow Meter
note: Heat-flow-meter test for thermal resistance of insulation samples.

full_name: ASTM C1363 — Thermal Performance of Building Materials and Envelope Assemblies (Hot Box)
note: Hot-box test for whole-assembly performance.

full_name: ASTM C1289 — Specification for Faced Rigid Cellular Polyisocyanurate Thermal Insulation Board
note: Polyiso product spec; LTTR per CAN/ULC S770.

full_name: ASTM C578 — Specification for Rigid Cellular Polystyrene Thermal Insulation
note: EPS and XPS product spec; Type designations.

full_name: ICC Evaluation Service Reports
note: Product-specific evaluation reports citing ASTM tests.

full_name: BRND-AI Building Energy Calculator
note: Internal MA-specific calculator embedding 11 ASHRAE-derived weather stations and parallel-path effective-R formulas; consistent with ASHRAE HOF.
